heading: Targeted grants to local educational agencies
label: 6335 Targeted grants to local educational agencies
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6335, , as added , , , related to targeted grants to local educational agencies, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by .Pub. L. 89–10, title I, § 1125Pub. L. 103–382, title I, § 101108 Stat. 3571Pub. L. 107–110Oct. 20, 1994
amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6335, , as added , , , related to targeted grants to local educational agencies, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by .Pub. L. 89–10, title I, § 1125Pub. L. 103–382, title I, § 101108 Stat. 3571Pub. L. 107–110Oct. 20, 1994

children.heading: Eligibility of local educational agencies
children.label: a Eligibility of local educational agencies
A
children.text: the number of children in the local educational agency counted under , before application of the weighted child count described in subsection (c), is at least 10; andsection 6333(c) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: if the number of children counted for grants under , before application of the weighted child count described in subsection (c), is at least 5 percent of the total number of children aged 5 to 17 years, inclusive, in the school district of the local educational agency.section 6333(c) of this title

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: 2 Special rule
children.text: For any fiscal year for which the Secretary allocates funds under this section on the basis of counties, funds made available as a result of applying this subsection shall be reallocated by the State educational agency to other eligible local educational agencies in the State in proportion to the distribution of other funds under this section.

children.heading: Grants for local educational agencies, the District of Columbia, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico
children.label: b Grants for local educational agencies, the District of Columbia, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico
A
children.text: the weighted child count determined under subsection (c); and

children.label: B
children.text: the amount determined under .section 6333(a)(1)(B) of this title

children.heading: Puerto Rico
children.label: 2 Puerto Rico
children.text: For each fiscal year, the amount of the grant the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico is eligible to receive under this section shall be equal to the number of children counted under subsection (c) for the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, multiplied by the amount determined in for the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.section 6333(a)(4) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: For each fiscal year for which the Secretary uses county population data to calculate grants, the weighted child count used to determine a county’s allocation under this section is the larger of the two amounts determined under subparagraphs (B) and (C).

children.label: i
children.text: the number of children determined under for that county who constitute not more than 15.00 percent, inclusive, of the county’s total population aged 5 to 17, inclusive, multiplied by 1.0;section 6333(c) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 15.00 percent, but not more than 19.00 percent, of such population, multiplied by 1.75;

children.label: iii
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 19.00 percent, but not more than 24.20 percent, of such population, multiplied by 2.5;

children.label: iv
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 24.20 percent, but not more than 29.20 percent, of such population, multiplied by 3.25; and

children.label: v
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 29.20 percent of such population, multiplied by 4.0.

children.label: i
children.text: the number of children determined under who constitute not more than 2,311, inclusive, of the county’s total population aged 5 to 17, inclusive, multiplied by 1.0;section 6333(c) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: the number of such children between 2,312 and 7,913, inclusive, in such population, multiplied by 1.5;

children.label: iii
children.text: the number of such children between 7,914 and 23,917, inclusive, in such population, multiplied by 2.0;

children.label: iv
children.text: the number of such children between 23,918 and 93,810, inclusive, in such population, multiplied by 2.5; and

children.label: v
children.text: the number of such children in excess of 93,811 in such population, multiplied by 3.0.

children.heading: Puerto Rico
children.label: D Puerto Rico
children.text: Notwithstanding subparagraph (A), the weighting factor for the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico under this paragraph shall not be greater than the total number of children counted under multiplied by 1.82.section 6333(c) of this title

children.heading: Weights for allocations to local educational agencies
children.label: 2 Weights for allocations to local educational agencies

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: For each fiscal year for which the Secretary uses local educational agency data, the weighted child count used to determine a local educational agency’s grant under this section is the larger of the two amounts determined under subparagraphs (B) and (C).

children.label: i
children.text: the number of children determined under for that local educational agency who constitute not more than 15.58 percent, inclusive, of the agency’s total population aged 5 to 17, inclusive, multiplied by 1.0;section 6333(c) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 15.58 percent, but not more than 22.11 percent, of such population, multiplied by 1.75;

children.label: iii
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 22.11 percent, but not more than 30.16 percent, of such population, multiplied by 2.5;

children.label: iv
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 30.16 percent, but not more than 38.24 percent, of such population, multiplied by 3.25; and

children.label: v
children.text: the number of such children who constitute more than 38.24 percent of such population, multiplied by 4.0.

children.label: i
children.text: the number of children determined under who constitute not more than 691, inclusive, of the agency’s total population aged 5 to 17, inclusive, multiplied by 1.0;section 6333(c) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: the number of such children between 692 and 2,262, inclusive, in such population, multiplied by 1.5;

children.label: iii
children.text: the number of such children between 2,263 and 7,851, inclusive, in such population, multiplied by 2.0;

children.label: iv
children.text: the number of such children between 7,852 and 35,514, inclusive, in such population, multiplied by 2.5; and

children.label: v
children.text: the number of such children in excess of 35,514 in such population, multiplied by 3.0.

children.heading: Puerto Rico
children.label: D Puerto Rico
children.text: Notwithstanding subparagraph (A), the weighting factor for the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico under this paragraph shall not be greater than the total number of children counted under multiplied by 1.82.section 6333(c) of this title

children.heading: Calculation of grant amounts
children.label: d Calculation of grant amounts
children.text: Grant amounts under this section shall be calculated in the same manner as grant amounts are calculated under section 6333(a)(2) and (3) of this title.
0.35 percent of the total amount available to carry out this section; or

children.label: A
children.text: 0.35 percent of the total amount available to carry out this section; and

children.label: B
children.text: 150 percent of the national average grant under this section per child described in , without application of a weighting factor, multiplied by the State’s total number of children described in , without application of a weighting factor.section 6333(c) of this titlesection 6333(c) of this title
